## Description

Brief description of the changes.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`npm test`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] TypeScript compiles (`npx tsc --noEmit`)
- [ ] Build succeeds (`npm run build`)
